events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need reason. Scenario: grout without vent holes causing voids per sounding test. API RP 686 likely requires vent holes in grout for machinery baseplates to allow air escape and ensure full bearing. Condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Grout voids reduce load transfer, can cause equipment misalignment, fatigue. Heavy industrial critical maybe high. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80. Value? Numeric reading not asked; maybe 0. Sound_source not asked. Confidence 0.95. Event_time 0, rate 0, order empty. Findings: grout lacks vent holes, sounding indicates voids, incomplete grout bearing. Actions: remove/repair grout, install vent holes per spec, re-grout, re-sound. Rationale. References API RP 686. Need ensure JSON valid.

    "Grout was placed without required vent holes, trapping air and producing voids.",
    "Sounding test indicates hollow areas under/around the baseplate, confirming incomplete grout bearing.",
    "Baseplate is not fully supported, jeopardizing load transfer and equipment alignment."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop acceptance of the baseplate grout installation.",
    "Remove defective grout where voided or, if permitted, repair by approved method.",
    "Re-grout using proper vent/purge ports to ensure full, void-free bearing.",
    "Re-perform sounding and dimensional/alignment checks before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "API RP 686 requires grout under machinery baseplates to be sound and free of voids, typically achieved with venting to allow air escape and full bearing. The observed grout lacks vent holes and sounding reveals voids, so the installation is non-compliant and defective.",
  "references": ["API RP 686"]
}
